name: write_image
description: Render diagram content to a PNG image file. Supports SVG, HTML, Mermaid, Graphviz DOT, and PlantUML formats. Output is saved as a PNG file in the project directory.

filename.description: Output image filename (relative to project work directory, e.g. 'diagram.png' or 'docs/flowchart.png')

type.description: Content type: 'svg' for SVG markup, 'html' for a full HTML page, 'mermaid' for Mermaid diagram syntax, 'dot' or 'graphviz' for Graphviz DOT language, 'plantuml' for PlantUML diagram syntax

content.description: The source content to render. For type=svg: raw SVG markup (e.g. '<svg>...</svg>'). For type=html: a complete HTML document. For type=mermaid: Mermaid diagram syntax (e.g. 'graph TD; A-->B;'). For type=dot/graphviz: Graphviz DOT language (e.g. 'digraph G { A -> B }'). For type=plantuml: PlantUML diagram syntax (e.g. '@startuml\nAlice -> Bob: Hello\n@enduml')

plantuml_server.description: Optional custom PlantUML server URL (e.g. 'http://localhost:8080'). Only used when type='plantuml'. Defaults to 'http://www.plantuml.com' if not specified.
